canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>plasma</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: #000; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, centerX, centerY, globeRadius;
let mouse = { x: null, y: null, inside: false, touching: false };
let tendrils = [];
let audioCtx = null;
let noiseNode = null;
let gainNode = null;
let filterNode = null;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  centerX = W / 2;
  centerY = H / 2;
  globeRadius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.38;
}

window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
resize();

// Audio setup
function initAudio() {
  if (audioCtx) return;
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  
  // Create noise buffer
  const bufferSize = audioCtx.sampleRate * 2;
  const noiseBuffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const output = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
  for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
    output[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
  }
  
  noiseNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
  noiseNode.buffer = noiseBuffer;
  noiseNode.loop = true;
  
  filterNode = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  filterNode.type = 'bandpass';
  filterNode.frequency.value = 2000;
  filterNode.Q.value = 5;
  
  gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
  gainNode.gain.value = 0;
  
  noiseNode.connect(filterNode);
  filterNode.connect(gainNode);
  gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  noiseNode.start();
}

// Mouse handling
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
  const dx = mouse.x - centerX;
  const dy = mouse.y - centerY;
  mouse.inside = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) < globeRadius;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', () => {
  initAudio();
  mouse.touching = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
  mouse.touching = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  mouse.x = null;
  mouse.y = null;
  mouse.inside = false;
  mouse.touching = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  initAudio();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouse.x = touch.clientX;
  mouse.y = touch.clientY;
  mouse.touching = true;
  const dx = mouse.x - centerX;
  const dy = mouse.y - centerY;
  mouse.inside = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) < globeRadius;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouse.x = touch.clientX;
  mouse.y = touch.clientY;
  const dx = mouse.x - centerX;
  const dy = mouse.y - centerY;
  mouse.inside = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) < globeRadius;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
  mouse.touching = false;
});

// Tendril class
class Tendril {
  constructor(angle, targetX, targetY) {
    this.baseAngle = angle;
    this.targetX = targetX;
    this.targetY = targetY;
    this.segments = [];
    this.life = 1;
    this.decay = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.02;
    this.hue = Math.random() < 0.5 ? 280 : 190; // purple or cyan
    this.branches = [];
    this.generatePath();
  }
  
  generatePath() {
    const startX = centerX + Math.cos(this.baseAngle) * 20;
    const startY = centerY + Math.sin(this.baseAngle) * 20;
    
    let x = startX;
    let y = startY;
    const dx = this.targetX - startX;
    const dy = this.targetY - startY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    const steps = Math.floor(dist / 8) + 5;
    
    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const t = i / steps;
      const targetX = startX + dx * t;
      const targetY = startY + dy * t;
      
      // Add jitter that increases then decreases
      const jitterAmount = Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 30;
      const jitterX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * jitterAmount;
      const jitterY = (Math.random() - 0.5) * jitterAmount;
      
      x = targetX + jitterX;
      y = targetY + jitterY;
      
      this.segments.push({ x, y, width: (1 - t) * 3 + 1 });
      
      // Random branching
      if (i > 3 && i < steps - 3 && Math.random() < 0.15) {
        this.createBranch(x, y, t);
      }
    }
  }
  
  createBranch(startX, startY, parentT) {
    const branchAngle = Math.atan2(this.targetY - centerY, this.targetX - centerX);
    const offset = (Math.random() - 0.5) * Math.PI * 0.6;
    const angle = branchAngle + offset;
    const length = (1 - parentT) * 40 + 20;
    
    const branch = [];
    let x = startX;
    let y = startY;
    const steps = Math.floor(length / 6);
    
    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const t = i / steps;
      x += Math.cos(angle + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5) * 6;
      y += Math.sin(angle + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5) * 6;
      branch.push({ x, y, width: (1 - t) * 2 + 0.5 });
    }
    
    this.branches.push(branch);
  }
  
  update() {
    this.life -= this.decay;
    return this.life > 0;
  }
  
  draw() {
    const alpha = this.life;
    
    // Draw main tendril
    this.drawPath(this.segments, alpha, 1);
    
    // Draw branches
    for (const branch of this.branches) {
      this.drawPath(branch, alpha * 0.7, 0.6);
    }
  }
  
  drawPath(segments, alpha, scale) {
    if (segments.length < 2) return;
    
    // Glow layer
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(segments[0].x, segments[0].y);
    for (let i = 1; i < segments.length; i++) {
      ctx.lineTo(segments[i].x, segments[i].y);
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${this.hue}, 100%, 70%, ${alpha * 0.3})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = segments[0].width * scale * 6;
    ctx.lineCap = 'round';
    ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Core
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(segments[0].x, segments[0].y);
    for (let i = 1; i < segments.length; i++) {
      ctx.lineTo(segments[i].x, segments[i].y);
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${this.hue}, 100%, 85%, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = segments[0].width * scale * 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Hot center
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(segments[0].x, segments[0].y);
    for (let i = 1; i < segments.length; i++) {
      ctx.lineTo(segments[i].x, segments[i].y);
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(0, 0%, 100%, ${alpha * 0.8})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = segments[0].width * scale * 0.5;
    ctx.stroke();
  }
}

// Spawn tendril toward mouse or random edge
function spawnTendril() {
  const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
  let targetX, targetY;
  
  if (mouse.x !== null && mouse.inside) {
    // Tend toward mouse with some spread
    const spread = 30;
    targetX = mouse.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * spread;
    targetY = mouse.y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * spread;
  } else if (mouse.x !== null) {
    // Mouse outside - tendrils reach toward it but stop at edge
    const dx = mouse.x - centerX;
    const dy = mouse.y - centerY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    const edgeX = centerX + (dx / dist) * globeRadius * 0.95;
    const edgeY = centerY + (dy / dist) * globeRadius * 0.95;
    targetX = edgeX + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40;
    targetY = edgeY + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40;
  } else {
    // No mouse - random edge
    const targetAngle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    const r = globeRadius * (0.6 + Math.random() * 0.35);
    targetX = centerX + Math.cos(targetAngle) * r;
    targetY = centerY + Math.sin(targetAngle) * r;
  }
  
  tendrils.push(new Tendril(angle, targetX, targetY));
}

// Draw the globe
function drawGlobe(time) {
  // Outer glow
  const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    centerX, centerY, globeRadius * 0.8,
    centerX, centerY, globeRadius * 1.2
  );
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(100, 0, 150, 0.1)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(50, 0, 100, 0.05)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Glass sphere edge
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, globeRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(150, 100, 200, 0.3)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.stroke();
  
  // Specular highlight
  const highlightX = centerX - globeRadius * 0.3;
  const highlightY = centerY - globeRadius * 0.3;
  const highlightGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    highlightX, highlightY, 0,
    highlightX, highlightY, globeRadius * 0.4
  );
  highlightGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)');
  highlightGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = highlightGrad;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, globeRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
  
  // Inner glow (electrode)
  const coreGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    centerX, centerY, 0,
    centerX, centerY, 30
  );
  coreGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 200, 255, 0.8)');
  coreGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(200, 100, 255, 0.4)');
  coreGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(100, 0, 150, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = coreGrad;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
  
  // Pulsing core
  const pulse = Math.sin(time * 0.003) * 0.3 + 0.7;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, 8 * pulse, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${0.5 + pulse * 0.3})`;
  ctx.fill();
}

// Touch point glow
function drawTouchPoint() {
  if (mouse.x === null || !mouse.inside) return;
  
  const intensity = mouse.touching ? 0.4 : 0.15;
  const size = mouse.touching ? 25 : 15;
  
  const touchGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    mouse.x, mouse.y, 0,
    mouse.x, mouse.y, size
  );
  touchGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255, 150, 255, ${intensity})`);
  touchGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 150, 255, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = touchGrad;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(mouse.x, mouse.y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
}

let lastSpawn = 0;
let time = 0;

function animate(timestamp) {
  time = timestamp;
  
  // Clear with slight fade for trails
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Spawn rate based on interaction
  let spawnRate = 120; // ms between spawns
  if (mouse.inside) spawnRate = 60;
  if (mouse.touching) spawnRate = 25;
  
  if (timestamp - lastSpawn > spawnRate) {
    const count = mouse.touching ? 3 : 1;
    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
      spawnTendril();
    }
    lastSpawn = timestamp;
  }
  
  // Update and draw tendrils
  tendrils = tendrils.filter(t => t.update());
  for (const tendril of tendrils) {
    tendril.draw();
  }
  
  // Keep tendril count reasonable
  if (tendrils.length > 50) {
    tendrils.splice(0, tendrils.length - 50);
  }
  
  // Draw globe on top
  drawGlobe(timestamp);
  drawTouchPoint();
  
  // Audio
  if (gainNode) {
    let targetGain = 0.02;
    let targetFreq = 1500;
    
    if (mouse.inside) {
      targetGain = 0.06;
      targetFreq = 2500;
    }
    if (mouse.touching) {
      targetGain = 0.12;
      targetFreq = 4000;
    }
    
    // Add crackle based on tendril activity
    const activity = tendrils.length / 30;
    targetGain += activity * 0.03;
    
    gainNode.gain.value += (targetGain - gainNode.gain.value) * 0.1;
    filterNode.frequency.value += (targetFreq - filterNode.frequency.value) * 0.1;
    filterNode.Q.value = 3 + activity * 5;
  }
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

requestAnimationFrame(animate);
</script>
</body>
</html>
